Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_WroteSec.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_WroteSecretCodeLockOpened
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_WroteSec.raw_text: {PLAYER}在门上写下\n密码。\p“戏法大王十分聪颖”\n…… …… …… ……\p锁“咔嗒”一声开了！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_WroteSec.display_text:
{PLAYER}在门上写下
密码。

“戏法大王十分聪颖”
…… …… …… ……

锁“咔嗒”一声开了！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedIntro.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedIntro.raw_text: 哪个开关能填补哪个洞？$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedIntro.display_text: 哪个开关能填补哪个洞？

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedDefea.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedDefeat
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedDefea.raw_text: 对战之后，\n我更加迷茫了！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedDefea.display_text:
对战之后，
我更加迷茫了！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedPostB.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedPostB.raw_text: 能请你帮我按下\n所有的开关吗？$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedPostB.display_text:
能请你帮我按下
所有的开关吗？

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulIntr.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulIntr.raw_text: 啊，这是你第二次\n挑战戏法屋！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulIntr.display_text:
啊，这是你第二次
挑战戏法屋！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulPost.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulPost.raw_text: 这房子里的谜题都是\n戏法大王一个人做成的。$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulPost.display_text:
这房子里的谜题都是
戏法大王一个人做成的。

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaI.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaIntro
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaI.raw_text: 我希望有一天能开设自己的道馆，\n所以，我要学习怎样设计谜题。$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaI.display_text:
我希望有一天能开设自己的道馆，
所以，我要学习怎样设计谜题。

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaD.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaDefeat
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaD.raw_text: 我对对战的学习还不足！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaD.display_text: 我对对战的学习还不足！

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaP.label: Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaPostBattle
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaP.raw_text: 你真强，不是吗？\n也许你已经有道馆馆主的实力了！$
Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaP.display_text:
你真强，不是吗？
也许你已经有道馆馆主的实力了！
